case_title: BRABY, EDWARD PAUL vs. JOHNSON, BOBBIE JEAN et al

docket_entries.description: C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE.PLAINTIFF THRU COUNSEL PRESENT AND DEFT APPEARED, REPRESENTING HERSELF. CASE SETTLED AND TERMS ENTERED ON RECORD BY PLFF.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOHNSON, BOBBIE JEAN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1495 GOLDEN GATE #1 $1,413.74 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,413.74, STAYED UNTIL NOV-28-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, 5:00 PM AS TO RESTITUTION ONLY. NO FURTHER STAYS. MONEY JDMT STAYED PROVIDED DEFT PAYS INSTALLMENTS - SEE JDMT AT LENGTH FOR FURTHER DETAILS. EACH SIDE BEARS OWN FEES & COSTS. PLTF TO KEEP SECURITY DEPOSIT.
